quoteFirst: About this time he wrote: "I am engaged in constant work; from
quoteTime: seven to ten in the morning
quoteLast: in committee, from ten to four in Congress, and from six to ten again in committee. Our assembly is scarcely numerous enough for the business; everybody is engaged all day in Congress, and all the morning and evening in committee."
